topStories.title: ChatGPT helps US man sell his home for $1 million within 5 days — Here's how AI helped beat market estimates
topStories.description: The man reportedly saved approximately 3% in commission fees and sold the property for at least $100,000 more than what an agent had estimated

topStories.title: Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
topStories.description: The tanker has reached Cuban waters just hours after Donald Trump said he had "no problem" with it arriving.

topStories.title: "If They Pump It": Iran's Speaker Has A Tip For Investors Burned By Trump
topStories.description: Ghalibaf's message is not just about trading tactics. It challenges how markets process power and information.

topStories.title: Trump wants to invade Iran to seize oil, calls US objectors ‘stupid people’
topStories.description: The Trump administration has deployed US Marines in preparation for the possible takeover of Iran's key oil export hub.

topStories.title: Did Israel miscalculate in launching the war on Iran?
topStories.description: Like in other conflicts, Israel launched the war on Iran together with the US without a realistic political plan.

topStories.title: US-Israel war on Iran: What’s happening on day 31 of attacks
topStories.description: While Trump has talked about diplomacy, fears of a ground invasion in Iran loom as US troops arrive in the region.

topStories.title: Mohamed Salah warned against US move as MLS clubs eye Egyptian footballer
topStories.description: Egyptian official says Liverpool star will fade away if he opts for the MLS as San Diego FC owner welcomes compatriot.

topStories.title: Olympic gold medalist Caster Semenya blasts IOC's new policy to ensure fairness in women's events
topStories.description: Olympic gold medalist Caster Semenya blasted the International Olympic Committee's policy that would ensure fairness across women's competitions.

topStories.title: Iran's war against the US and Israel is being fueled by North Korean weapons, expert warns
topStories.description: Iran's ballistic missiles, including the Shahab-3 and Khorramshahr-4, were developed with North Korean help, says expert Bruce Bechtol, who urges stronger sanctions enforcement.

topStories.title: Homan fires back at CBS host on DHS shutdown blame, points to Democrats as the culprit
topStories.description: Tom Homan said Democrats were responsible for the DHS shutdown during a contentious interview on CBS’s Face the Nation, where Margaret Brennan challenged him over Republican control of Congress and the White House.

topStories.title: Insurgent Virginia Democrat says his party is ‘completely wrong’ on gun rights and gerrymandering
topStories.description: Democratic primary challenger Mark Moran says his party is "completely wrong" on gun rights, sparking backlash from Virginia Democrats over his Second Amendment stance.

dailyNews.title: Cruise passengers complained about cabin problem, now ships are making a big change
dailyNews.description: Two huge Royal Caribbean ships address one of the most common passenger complaints about connecting rooms. Icon and Star of the Seas have exterior doors to block out noise.

dailyNews.title: NEWT GINGRICH: Democrats could get an alarming wake-up call in 2026 election
dailyNews.description: Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz's administration and a $9–$16 billion state fraud scandal are some of the major Democratic Party liabilities ahead of the 2026 election.

dailyNews.title: AI war in Iran has brought conflict to Silicon Valley. No one is ready
dailyNews.description: Iran published a 29-location target list naming Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Nvidia and Palantir, then struck AWS data centers in the UAE and Bahrain.

dailyNews.title: More and more Gen Z women say they don’t want kids. As a young mom, here’s what they get wrong
dailyNews.description: As a Gen Z mom, I've found motherhood's challenges yield more joy than sacrifice—despite social media's DINK glamorization discouraging young women.

dailyNews.title: Interactive tool reveals which states stand to lose billions in education funding
dailyNews.description: An interactive tool from the America First Policy Institute reveals how states could miss billions in education funding and millions of scholarships by opting out.

dailyNews.title: Dem senator warns deportation could let Virginia woman's illegal immigrant killer 'escape accountability'
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tim Kaine says Abdul Jalloh, charged with murdering Stephanie Minter in Virginia, should be fully prosecuted before any deportation to ensure accountability.

dailyNews.title: US allows Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba amid blockade as Trump says island ‘has to survive’
dailyNews.description: The U.S. is reportedly allowing a Russian oil tanker to reach Cuba as President Donald Trump eases pressure on the island, saying country "needs to survive."

dailyNews.title: Lionel Richie issues warning to rude celebrities after Chappell Roan backlash
dailyNews.description: Lionel Richie warns rising stars to embrace fan support, saying fame without people "doesn't work," amid Chappell Roan's Brazil fan incident controversy.

dailyNews.title: Trump claims donor-funded White House ballroom includes hidden build below with security focus
dailyNews.description: A $400 million White House ballroom approved by the Commission of Fine Arts will include an underground complex, Trump says, funded by private donors.

dailyNews.title: 'Lion King' composer sues comedian for $27M over 'Circle of Life' joke
dailyNews.description: Zimbabwean comedian Learnmore Jonasi was accused by South African composer Lebo M of making false statements about the opening chant in Disney's "The Lion King."

dailyNews.title: Trump dominates CPAC poll as conservatives rally behind agenda, back Iran action
dailyNews.description: A new CPAC survey finds strong conservative backing for Trump's agenda, with 91% supporting tariffs and 89% backing military action in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Rob Schneider proposes military draft, urges Americans to 'recommit' to traditional values
dailyNews.description: Actor Rob Schneider invoked a JFK quote on X while calling for restoring the military draft, urging every American to serve two years of service at 18.

topStories.description: The Trump administration is poised to broaden access to risky investments that are showing signs of strain.

topStories.title: New Political Group to Push Trump’s A.I. Agenda in Midterms
topStories.description: The group, Innovation Council Action, says it plans to spend at least $100 million. It will be led by a former administration official.

dailyNews.title: Texas Border Wall Plan in Big Bend Draws Opposition From Republicans and Democrats
dailyNews.description: Plans for a wall in Big Bend National Park prompted public protests and behind-the-scenes lobbying to sway the Trump administration to stop.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Birthright Citizenship Order at Supreme Court Splits Conservative Scholars
dailyNews.description: Before President Trump’s order to limit birthright citizenship, there was widespread agreement that the 14th Amendment guaranteed citizenship for U.S.-born babies.

dailyNews.title: They’ve Been Accused of Running a ‘Covert’ Operation in Greenland. It’s No Secret.
dailyNews.description: Members of President Trump’s circle, working in plain sight, have caught the eye of Denmark’s intelligence services for trying to make friends and cut deals on the Danish territory.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices soar as Trump threatens to invade Iran, seize its resources
dailyNews.description: Energy markets remain volatile as Trump threatens Iran with an invasion to seize its oil while also suggesting a deal could soon end the war.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he has "no problem" with Russian tanker bringing oil to Cuba
dailyNews.description: When asked if a New York Times report that the tanker would be allowed to reach Cuba was true, Mr. Trump said: "If a country wants to send some oil into Cuba right now, I have no problem whether it's Russia or not."

dailyNews.title: States pay contractors millions to comply with Trump law to cut Medicaid rolls
dailyNews.description: The One Big Beautiful Bill Act will add red tape and restrictions for those seeking Medicaid and SNAP benefits. And the costs to update computer systems that determine eligibility for those programs will be steep.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration scaling back asylum crackdown, sources say
dailyNews.description: The unprecedented move amounted to an indefinite suspension of all asylum requests filed outside of immigration court, regardless of the applicant's nationality.

dailyNews.title: Trump sends mixed messages on Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump has repeatedly claimed, including as recently as this weekend, that the war in Iran has been won. Still, he insists that Iran also wants to negotiate as more troops head to the Middle East. Cristian Benavides has more.

dailyNews.title: President Trump claims 'regime change' has happened in Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump spoke to reporters on Air Force One and claimed that "regime change" has happened in Iran since the conflict began and that it was imperative.

dailyNews.title: Looking to limit birthright citizenship, Trump turns to an 1884 ruling against a Native American man
dailyNews.description: Defending birthright citizenship changes, President Donald Trump's administration is citing an 1884 Supreme Court case called Elk v. Wilkins about voting rights for a Native American man.

dailyNews.title: Trump claims 'regime change' has happened in Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump claims 'regime change' has happened in Iran

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy asked if Trump cares about the future of Ukraine
dailyNews.description: In an interview with NBC News’ Raf Sanchez, President Zelenskyy says that he hopes President Trump cares about the future of Ukraine, but “they care about the United States more.”
